creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-01-04 15:06:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/mythweb          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/mythweb/files    pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  MythWeb provides a frontend for scheduling and managing recordings
  on your MythBox from a web browser located on another machine.
  Provided the security is set up correctly on your MythBox you can
  access your machine from anywhere on the internet, or even your
  mobile phone as long as you have a compatible browser.
  
  WWW:    http://www.mythtv.org/wiki/MythWeb
  
  PR:             ports/142148
  Submitted by:   Bernhard Froehlich <decke at bluelife.at>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2517    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/www/mythweb/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/mythweb/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/mythweb/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/mythweb/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +778 -0    ports/www/mythweb/pkg-plist (new)
